steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The goal is clear: emphasize “the order in which the two lighthouse keepers began their careers.” The key signal is that we must compare when they BEGAN (started), not when they ENDED.

steps.title: Find the choice that accomplishes this
steps.content:
Choice B directly compares when each career began (“began her career...years after”), showing that Elizabeth started first.

The other choices either lack specific information about career beginnings (A), shift focus to when they ended (C), or contain inaccurate information (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
